# CrftdWeb — Full Context

> CrftdWeb is a custom web design and development agency based in the United Kingdom. We build hand-coded websites using Next.js, React, and TypeScript that are designed to convert visitors into customers. Every site scores 90+ on Google PageSpeed and is delivered within 14 days.

## About CrftdWeb

CrftdWeb was founded on one principle: most websites look fine but don't convert. We build websites that are conversion-first, not cosmetic.

Unlike traditional agencies that hand you a WordPress template with your logo slapped on, CrftdWeb writes every line of code from scratch. This means faster load times (sub-2 seconds), better SEO scores, and sites that are built around how your customers actually buy.

Our methodology is four steps: Discover the real business problem. Design around what converts. Develop with production-grade code. Deliver something that performs.

**Contact:** hello@crftdweb.com  
**Website:** https://www.crftdweb.com  
**Location:** United Kingdom (serving clients worldwide)

## Services

### Core Service: Custom Website Design & Development
We design and build custom-coded websites from scratch. No templates, no page builders, no WordPress compromises. Every project is hand-built in Next.js and delivered in 14 days.

**What's included:**
- Conversion-focused design based on your customer journey
- Custom code in Next.js, React, TypeScript
- 90+ Google PageSpeed score guaranteed
- Mobile-first, responsive design
- SEO structure built in from day one
- Schema markup for rich search results
- Handover with full training

### Industry-Specific Web Design

**Restaurants:** Online booking integrations (OpenTable, ResDiary, Resy), mobile menus, local SEO schema, Google Maps integration, Instagram feed. Average 3.4x speed improvement, +280% booking increase.

**Dentists:** Patient booking systems, treatment pages, GDPR-compliant data handling, CQC-structured content, trust signals. Built around NHS and private patient journeys.

**Salons & Beauty:** Booking integration (Fresha, Treatwell), service galleries, team profiles, local SEO. Mobile-first design for on-the-go bookings.

**Gyms & Fitness:** Membership sign-up flows, class schedules, lead capture, personal trainer profiles. Designed to reduce friction from visitor to member.

**Estate Agents:** Property listing pages, mortgage calculator tools, area guides, valuation request forms, rightmove integration. Built for conversion from search to enquiry.

### Products

**The Playbook:** A 6-stage methodology for service providers who want to stop trading time for money and start building scalable products. Covers positioning, productisation, pricing, selling, delivering, and scaling. URL: https://www.crftdweb.com/playbook

**Engine:** An AI-powered system for coaches and agencies to launch, sell, and automate high-ticket offers. Includes AI-powered content, funnels, and agents. URL: https://www.crftdweb.com/engine

## Case Studies

### Microbiome Design
**Problem:** Cutting-edge science company with a website that looked like a student project. Investors weren't taking them seriously.
**Solution:** Full custom rebuild in Next.js. Redesigned around three core audiences: researchers, investors, and partners. Credibility signals, clear value proposition, conversion-focused layout.
**Result:** 97 PageSpeed score. Professional online presence that matches the quality of their science.
URL: https://www.crftdweb.com/blog/microbiome-design-case-study

### The Life Lab HQ
**Problem:** Great content and expertise, but visitors browsed and left without signing up. The site didn't guide anyone to take action.
**Solution:** Mapped the full customer journey from first visit to sign-up. Rebuilt every page around a single conversion goal. Trust signals at each decision point.
**Result:** +340% conversion increase. Clear path from landing page to sign-up with friction removed at every step.
URL: https://www.crftdweb.com/blog/life-lab-hq-case-study

### WordPress vs Custom-Coded (Guide)
An honest comparison of WordPress vs custom-coded websites covering speed, cost, SEO, security, and maintenance — with real data. 3.4x average speed difference.
URL: https://www.crftdweb.com/blog/wordpress-vs-custom-coded-website

## Pricing

We publish a full pricing guide at https://www.crftdweb.com/services/website-cost.

**Typical ranges:**
- Small business website (5-7 pages): £1,500–£3,000
- Service business website (8-15 pages): £3,000–£6,000
- Complex web app / membership platform: £6,000–£15,000+

All projects include design, development, SEO setup, schema markup, and a 90+ PageSpeed guarantee.

## Technical Approach

- **Framework:** Next.js 14+ with App Router
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Hosting:** Vercel (edge-optimised CDN)
- **Performance:** Sub-2s load times, 90+ Core Web Vitals
- **SEO:** Schema markup (Organization, Service, FAQ, Article, BreadcrumbList, Person, WebSite), sitemap.xml, robots.txt
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4, Vercel Analytics

- **Answers:** /answers — Direct answers to common web design questions
- **Concepts:** /concepts — Deep dives into web design methodology and strategy
- **Glossary:** /glossary — Definitions of key web design and development terms
- **Blog:** /blog — Case studies and guides
- **FAQ:** /faq — Common questions about our services

## Brand Values

1. **Craft over speed** — We don't rush. Every line of code is intentional.
2. **Conversion over cosmetics** — Pretty sites that don't perform are useless.
3. **Transparency** — You know what you're getting before we write a single line of code.
4. **Performance** — 90+ PageSpeed is not a bonus, it's our baseline.
5. **Results** — We measure success by what your site does for your business.
